item.title: PGATOUR: PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 11min Matt Fitzpatrick on Viktor Hovland: "His work ethic is fantastic. He's always looking to impro
item.description:
PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 11min Matt Fitzpatrick on Viktor Hovland: "His work ethic is fantastic. He's always looking to improve. He's always looking to find that perfection and play great golf."
Viktor Hovland on Matt Fitzpatrick: "He works so hard. He's extremely methodical ... He doesn't really care what Mostrar más 3 43 10 mil
